sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check red path at current position (cols 14-18)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
red_now = None
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        red_now = n
        break

print(f"Red path: pixels={red_now['pixels'] if red_now else 'N/A'}, hash={red_now['hash'] if red_now else 'N/A'}")

# Move RIGHT to cols 20-24 and check red path
action(['RIGHT'])

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
red_after = None
for n in seg2['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        red_after = n
        break

print(f"After RIGHT: red pixels={red_after['pixels'] if red_after else 'N/A'}, hash={red_after['hash'] if red_after else 'N/A'}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check red path at current position (cols 14-18)
seg = current_frame.segmentation
red_now = None
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        red_now = n
        break

print(f"Red path: pixels={red_now['pixels'] if red_now else 'N/A'}, hash={red_now['hash'] if red_now else 'N/A'}")

# Move RIGHT to cols 20-24 and check red path
action(['RIGHT'])

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
red_after = None
for n in seg2['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'R':
        red_after = n
        break

print(f"After RIGHT: red pixels={red_after['pixels'] if red_after else 'N/A'}, hash={red_after['hash'] if red_after else 'N/A'}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL RESULT: python
sections.content:
